title: Intensely Garlicky Crispy Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: This dish features crispy chicken skewers with a rich garlicky flavor, served with a side of clotted cream, perfect for a dinner or snack
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the garlic mixture
Thread the chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes
While the chicken is baking, blanch the skewers in hot water for 30 seconds to crisp the outside
Remove the skewers from the water and place them back on the baking sheet
Increase the oven temperature to broil and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown
Serve the skewers hot with a side of clotted cream and garnish with lemon wedges
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
